home.title: Choose a service or go to contact
home.body: If you already know what you need, open the service. If not, we can guide you from the contact page.

servicesIndex.title: Three services and a clear way to contact us
servicesIndex.body: Each page summarises one technical line. If you prefer to explain the case directly, go to contact or WhatsApp.

journey.title: Turn this need into a clear enquiry
journey.body: You can go to contact, return to the index or review the company before deciding.

related.title: Services often reviewed together
related.body: Related options for connected technical needs.

faqCta.title: If you need a more precise review, go to contact
faqCta.body: When the answer depends on the space or on several services, it is best to explain the case by phone, WhatsApp or form.

about.title: After the company overview, the next step is service or contact
about.body: You can open the most relevant service or write directly to explain the need.

contact.title: If you are still deciding between services, here is a quick route
contact.body: Review the services, learn more about the company, check the reviews or call directly.
